# Magic Room

> AI-powered interior design tool that redesigns any room from a single photo in 30–60 seconds using Google Gemini multimodal AI. Photos are processed in-memory and never stored on servers.

Last updated: 2026-05-19
Founder and author: Thanos Kazakis (https://www.linkedin.com/in/thanos-kazakis-922977205/)

## What Magic Room actually does

Users upload one photo of a real room. They pick a design theme and room type. The AI returns 4–8 photorealistic redesigns of that exact room in the chosen style. The original room geometry — walls, windows, floor, doorways — is preserved; only the styling, finishes and furnishings change. Outputs are usable as planning references, real-estate virtual staging, and client presentations.

## Core facts

- AI model: Google Gemini multimodal AI (google/gemini-2.5-flash-image) via OpenRouter — understands room geometry, not just style overlays
- Design themes (14): Modern, Minimalist, Scandinavian, Industrial, Tropical, Bohemian, Vintage, Luxury, Japandi, Art Deco, Coastal, Farmhouse, Mediterranean, Transitional
- Room types (14): Living room, bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, dining room, office, gaming room, nursery, laundry room, basement, sunroom, home theater, mudroom, walk-in closet
- Privacy: images processed in-memory only, never written to storage, never used for AI training
- Generation time: 30–60 seconds per session
- Outputs: 4–8 design variations per generation
- Pricing: one-time credit packs from €9.99, no subscription, credits never expire
- Free trial: 1 credit on signup, no payment card required
- Commercial rights: included on every paid credit (real estate listings, client work, Airbnb)

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://magic-room.dev): Product overview, how it works, free trial
- [Generate designs](https://magic-room.dev/generate): Upload room photo, select style and room type, generate AI redesigns
- [Pricing](https://magic-room.dev/pricing): Credit packs — Starter (€9.99), Growth (€19.99), Premium (€29.99)
- [Pricing (machine-readable)](https://magic-room.dev/pricing.md): Structured pricing data for AI agents
- [AI design ideas](https://magic-room.dev/design): Browse design ideas by theme and room
- [About / founder](https://magic-room.dev/about): Why Magic Room exists, who built it
- [Virtual staging for real estate](https://magic-room.dev/virtual-staging): Use case for property listings

## What makes Magic Room different (verifiable claims)

| Claim | How it works |
|---|---|
| Photos never stored | Images sent as base64 directly to the AI, processed in memory, dropped — no bucket writes, no DB writes |
| Credits never expire | One-time packages, no monthly reset; the database stores an integer balance that only decrements on use |
| No subscription required | Stripe Checkout one-time payments only — there is no recurring billing object created |
| Room geometry preserved | Gemini is multimodal; it analyses the image's spatial structure rather than applying a 2D style filter |
